block_01: Coronavirus is affecting the global financial markets. The S&P 500 has lost over a third of its value between February 19 and March 23. The fast recovery is no longer possible and a full-fledged crisis cannot be ruled out.
block_02: However, certain trading techniques can still demonstrate decent performance, even in the current age of uncertainty. Here is how to adjust your trading strategy to the COVID-19 pandemic.
block_04: What to do when the market is flat?
block_05: A flat market is generally considered to be not the best time to trade. However, there are several different trade-related activities that you can engage in when there is no strong trend present.
block_07: Telling the trend from price noise
block_08: Random Walk Index is arguably the best trend-spotting indicator. It can help you determine whether the price movement is random or is a part of a bigger trend. Here is how to use in trading.
